creator: setantae@submonkey.net
text:
On Wed, Nov 07, 2001 at 02:55:08PM -0500, mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org wrote:
> 
> tells user to recompile kernel for USB mouse, when is supported by
> default on -current.

> In FreeBSD 4.X, USB devices should work out of the box.

-current != 4.4-(RELEASE|STABLE)

If, however, you actually meant it's supported by -stable then this fix is
good (I don't own a usb mouse, so wouldn't know either way).

Ceri

-- 
keep a mild groove on
